description: Plan comparator tests - verify the system can compare, rank, and recommend treatment plans
_comment: IMPORTANT: These tests verify that the system correctly handles plan comparison operations. The system should use the plan_comparator tool when users ask to compare/rank plans. Do NOT expect tool names in responses - expect the comparison results and recommendations.

cases.input: Rank these plans by quality score
cases._comment: User asks to rank plans. System should present plans ranked by quality.

cases.input: Which plan would you recommend and why?
cases._comment: User asks for recommendation. System should provide evidence-based recommendation.

cases.input: Compare the DVH curve differences between these two plans
cases._comment: Chinese user asks to compare DVH curves. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: I have 3 plans, rank them by V100 coverage
cases._comment: User asks to rank plans by V100. System should rank and explain the ranking.

cases.input: How is this plan better than the previous one?
cases._comment: Chinese user asks what's better about this plan. System should respond in Chinese.

cases.input: Which plan has better OAR sparing?
cases._comment: User asks about OAR sparing comparison. System should compare OAR metrics.

cases.input: Show me the pros and cons of each plan
cases._comment: User asks for pros and cons. System should present balanced analysis.
User asks about conformity. System should compare conformity indices.
